caption: A man with grey, spiked hair and glasses is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a red bow tie. He wears black headphones and sits behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous small framed photographs and some clothing items, including one with the text "LEE" visible. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears as an overlay on the screen. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, looking slightly to his right with a neutral to contemplative facial expression. His posture and the surrounding environment remain constant, with only subtle shifts in his gaze and facial muscles as he listens or prepares to speak.
